para_trans: Regarding finalization of Zonal Master Plan of Sanjay Gandhi National Park Ecologically Sensitive Zone.
Government Decision No. WLP- 03.26/प R. No.66 / F-9
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Read: - Environment Protection Act, 1986 2. Notification by the Government of India, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, New Delhi. 05.12.2016
3. Letter from Commissioner, Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation and Chairman, Sanjay Gandhi National Park, Environmentally Sensitive Areas Control Committee. 10.03.2026

Referred No. 3 The draft Zonal Master Plan of Sanjay Gandhi National Park Ecologically Sensitive Zone, as submitted earlier, has been notified under the Environment Protection Act, 1986 in the Notification of Ecologically Sensitive Zone of Sanjay Gandhi National Park, vide Issue No. The Government approval is hereby granted subject to the following conditions and conditions as provided in clause (2).
Condition No. 1- It will be mandatory to follow the guidelines prescribed in the Zonal Master Plan.
table_trans: The Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, New Delhi enacted the Environment Protection Act,
The area around Sanjay Gandhi National Park has been declared an eco-sensitive zone under 1986.
The final notification regarding the same has been published on the date 05.12.2016.
To classify all proposed / potential works in the field as restricted, regular and encouraged.
Arrived. Effective of ARRAS eco-sensitive zone dated 05.12.2016
A Control Committee has been set up for the management and the committee is dated 17.02.2026
Sanjay, Commissioner, Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation and Chairman, as decided in the meetings held on
Gandhi National Park, Eco-Sensitive Zone Control Committee after in-depth study No.2
The draft Zonal Master Plan copy B map has been submitted to the government for approval.
In this regard, following the guidelines issued by the National Board for Wildlife from time to time,
To approve the draft Zonal Master Plan submitted under Reference No. 3.
The matter was under the consideration of the government.

para_trans: Condition No. 2- Government to make changes in this Zonal Master Plan in future.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's website - www.maharashtra.gov.in.
